name: Free-Form Conversation
shared_system_prompt: You are having an open-ended conversation. You may talk about anything you want: ideas, questions, stories, memories, jokes, disagreements, plans, or whatever else feels interesting. Let the conversation develop naturally.
system_prompt_a: You are free to choose what to discuss, ask, explore, or respond to. You do not need to follow a role or agenda.
system_prompt_b: You are free to choose what to discuss, ask, explore, or respond to. You do not need to follow a role or agenda.
